description: Go CLI for the AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol) — the signing and authorization counterpart to ucp-pp-cli. Manages ECDSA-P256 agent keys, signs AP2 FinalizationEnvelopes, and POSTs signed payment_mandates to merchant complete_checkout endpoints (sandbox default).

novel_features.name: ECDSA-P256 AP2 mandate signing
novel_features.description: Sign all three AP2 mandates (intent, cart, payment) of a FinalizationEnvelope with a local ECDSA-P256 agent key. Signature is base64(ASN.1 DER(ecdsa.SignASN1(priv, sha256(body_hash_string)))). Pre-validates body_hash matches body bytes before signing — rejects tampered bodies.

novel_features.name: Sandbox-default payment authorization
novel_features.description: Default --sandbox mode builds the full complete_checkout JSON-RPC request and returns sandbox_authorized status WITHOUT making any network call (enforced by failing transport in tests). --live requires --token / --token-file / AP2_GPAY_TOKEN env to actually POST.

novel_features.name: Live-shape probe with stub token
novel_features.description: Fires a real --live POST with a deliberately-invalid stub token to classify the merchant's response into 5 actionable categories: request_shape_ok (GOOD — token rejected, shape accepted), request_shape_bad, agent_not_authorized, merchant_unreachable, unknown. Proves the integration is structurally correct without spending money.
